characters.appearance: Young male, approximately 20 years old, medium build, light brown complexion. He has short, curly dark hair, a small mustache, and a goatee. He wears small stud earrings.
characters.wardrobe: Black zip-up jacket over a white t-shirt, accessorized with a silver chain necklace.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Main thak chuka hoon tooti-phooti English bol ke. [I am tired of speaking broken English.]
Character A says: Hello, mera naam Rahul hai. [Hello, my name is Rahul.]
Character A says: Aur maine decide kiya hai ki main har roz English bolunga jab tak main fluent nahi ho jata. [And I have decided that I will speak English every day until I become fluent.]
Character A says: I'm giving myself one year or less to become fluent in English.
Character A says: Agar aapki bhi English weak hai, aur aap hesitation feel karte ho, [If your English is also weak, and you feel hesitation,]
Character A says: toh tension mat lo. Hum saath milkar seekhenge. [then don't worry. We will learn together.]
Character A says: Mera focus sirf practical speaking par hai. Koi boring grammar books nahi. [My focus is purely on practical speaking. No boring grammar books.]
Character A says: Main Supernova app par AI tutor ke saath daily practice kar raha hoon. [I am practicing daily with an AI tutor on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: Toh agar aap bhi English bolna seekhna chahte ho, [So if you also want to learn to speak English,]
Character A says: aaj hi Supernova try karo. Let's learn English together! [try Supernova today. Let's learn English together!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a highly relatable pain point (frustration with broken English) right at the hook.
- Builds a parasocial connection by setting a personal goal and inviting the viewer to join the journey.
- Introduces Supernova's practical, AI-driven approach as the alternative to boring textbooks.
- Ends with a warm, encouraging call to action to download the app.
